utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists five items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all five of these items are present. Each one includes all the necessary details as specified: coverage details and cost estimates for health, property, travel, and additional services, plus a total budget breakdown with monthly and annual totals. Therefore, all five required items are fully specified and included.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final coverage plan lists four main categories. For health_coverage, the plan 'Balanced Professional Package9' includes both physical and mental health, preventive care, telemedicine, and stress management. The closest match in the ground-truth ratings with similar features (5% deductible, €100/month, 24/7 support, gym reimbursement) is 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under physical_health (rating 9). Property_coverage focuses on business equipment, electronics, and liability, which aligns best with 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' under property_protection.home_content (rating 10). Travel_coverage includes adventure sports, evacuation, and international assistance, matching 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance (rating 10). Additional_services include wellness programs, gym reimbursement, and telemedicine — these correspond to 'Wellness Programs' (rating 3), 'Gym Membership Reimbursement' (rating 2), and 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 10).
